childhood.familyBackground: Lutnick grew up in New York and was raised by a single mother who was a teacher. His mother instilled values of hard work and perseverance.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 루트닉은 뉴욕에서 교사인 편모에 의해 양육되었다.
childhood.earlyLife: Lutnick started working on Wall Street at a young age and quickly rose through the ranks. He founded Cantor Fitzgerald, which became a major financial services firm.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 루트닉은 어린 나이에 월스트리트에서 일하기 시작했고 빠르게 승진했다.

careerTimeline.event: Joined Cantor Fitzgerald as young trader and executive
careerTimeline.eventKo: 젊은 트레이더 및 경영진으로 Cantor Fitzgerald에 합류

careerTimeline.event: Became majority shareholder and CEO of Cantor Fitzgerald
careerTimeline.eventKo: Cantor Fitzgerald의 대주주 및 CEO가 됨

careerTimeline.event: Rebuilt Cantor Fitzgerald after 9/11 tragedy; achieved billionaire status
careerTimeline.eventKo: 9/11 비극 이후 Cantor Fitzgerald 재건; 억만장자 지위 달성

failures.description: Financial services firm faced severe challenges during financial crisis
failures.descriptionKo: 금융 서비스 회사가 금융 위기 중 심각한 도전에 직면
failures.lesson: Financial services firms must maintain strong risk management and liquidity reserves
failures.lessonKo: 금융 서비스 회사는 강한 위험 관리 및 유동성 보유를 유지해야 한다

quotes.text: In times of crisis, leadership and compassion define character
quotes.textKo: 위기 시대에 리더십과 동정심은 성격을 정의한다

authored.title: Cantor Fitzgerald: A Legacy
authored.why: Documents his journey rebuilding after 9/11 tragedy

recommended.title: When Markets Collide
recommended.author: Mohamed El-Erian
recommended.note: Shaped his understanding of financial market dynamics
recommended.noteKo: 금융 시장 역학에 대한 이해를 형성함

personalTraits.knownFor: Financial services leadership; Cantor Fitzgerald CEO; resilience and recovery after 9/11
personalTraits.knownForKo: 금융 서비스 리더십; Cantor Fitzgerald CEO; 9/11 이후의 회복력과 회복
personalTraits.philanthropy: Major philanthropist; established charities for 9/11 victims and their families
personalTraits.philanthropyKo: 주요 자선가; 9/11 피해자 및 그 가족을 위한 자선 단체 설립
